labels.name: Indoor
labels.description: Activity intent is primarily inside a building or enclosed space.

labels.name: Outdoor
labels.description: Activity intent is primarily outside or requires outdoor movement/conditions.

labels.name: Mixed
labels.description: Phrase contains two conflicting intents where neither clearly dominates.
examples: work from office then evening walk

labels.name: Unclear
labels.description: Intent cannot be determined reliably due to ambiguity, incompleteness, or noise.
